---
title: "Worked Example in R"
id: "BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION-se01-sec01-sp02"
section_id: "binomial_distribution-se01-sec01"
session_id: "binomial_distribution-se01"
toc: True
---









## Problem or scenario

_Describe the problem, case study, or scenario that will be explored._

## Step-by-step walkthrough

_Break down the process or solution into clear, numbered steps._

## Result

_Show the final result or outcome of the process._

## Key takeaway

_Summarize the most important lesson from this example._

---

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION-se01-sec01-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">What is the Binomial Distribution?</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION-se01-sec01-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Practice Activity</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
